summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DataMe website - backend APIs, frontend functionality, and full integration testing. Backend APIs working well with 87.5% success rate. Frontend fully functional with lead capture form successfully integrating with backend.

validation_issues.issue: Email validation not working - accepts invalid email formats
validation_issues.impact: Allows invalid email data to be stored in database

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all key sections (hero, stats, services overview, case studies preview)
Navigation links work correctly (Home, Services dropdown, Case Studies, Insights)
Services page loads with working Offense/Defense tabs
Case Studies page loads with functional filter buttons
Case Study detail pages load correctly with back navigation
Insights page loads with working pillar filter tabs
Lead Magnet dialog opens from multiple CTA buttons (navbar, hero, lead magnet section)
Lead capture form submission successfully stores data in MongoDB backend
Footer renders with all social and service links
Brand colors and gradients display correctly (#ff6f28 orange, #2274df blue)
Backend APIs: POST /api/leads and GET /api/leads working correctly
Backend APIs: POST /api/contact and GET /api/contacts working correctly
Form validation works for required fields (name, email, message)
Complete navigation flow between all pages works smoothly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix email validation in backend - currently accepts invalid email formats like 'invalid-email' when it should return 422 validation error

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major functionality working, minor navigation timing issue)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (Lead form submission to backend working perfectly)
